<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band13_chunk005.pdf#page=15 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band13 p228 -->

<!-- header: HOFGARTENPAVILLONS -->

<!-- header: HOFGARTENPAVILLONS -->


[[File:Band13_chunk005_p015_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band13_chunk005_p015_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band13_chunk005_p015_img003.jpg|thumb|A Neptun (Johann Michael Franz 1781)]]



[[File:Band13_chunk005_p015_img004.jpg|thumb]]


unten: 3 Feuer und Wasser, 7 Herbst, 6 Sommer, 2 Luft und Wasser


[[File:Band13_chunk005_p015_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band13_chunk005_p015_img006.jpg|thumb|B Flora, links Sommer, rechts Herbst]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band13 p229 -->
